name: experimental-design
tagline: Guides picking an experiment/study design and generates seeded randomization or DOE layouts via bundled Python scripts.
verdict: Clean, well-scoped methodology skill. No credential access, no network egress beyond a plain `uv pip install` of well-known packages (numpy, pandas, pyDOE3), no hidden instructions or reviewer-manipulation attempts, and everything runs locally and deterministically (seeded). Only soft gap: no explicit guidance for install failures or violated design assumpti

highlights.summary: No guidance for failure paths — e.g. what to do if the `uv pip install` fails, pyDOE3 is unavailable, or chosen design assumptions turn out to be violated; a user hitting an install error has no fallb
